text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and I are on the train home after a
day out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You heading home?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I see. Where'd you go?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Out. Nowhere worth talking about.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, I'll be the judge of that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! I heard something
interesting! Listen to this...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Are you heading straight back to the academy,
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What're you gonna do once you get back? Eat?
Take a bath? Train?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not sure yet.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! You gotta work with me here a little! Say
something!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What's the topic?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, whenever I try and talk to Brian, she just
gives me a one-word answer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You must know a topic that catches her interest. You're her trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something to get Narita Brian's attention and get
her talking...
choice_data_list: How about a race back to the academy?
How're things going with the student council?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not really a conversation topic...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Great idea! Hey, Brian, let's have a race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pass. Sounds like a pain.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...But, I wouldn't mind running with you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! All right—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Just not now. I'll make time for it later, even if it's
between training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll hold you to it! Don't forget, 'kay? I'm
gonna ask you every day so you remember.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't. That's annoying. We'll still run even if you
don't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we all have a good talk about training
and racing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm curious about that too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure you're always in the student
council office.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But no one tells me anything about the actual
work.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like, what is it that you do, Brian? Are you Prez's
bodyguard or something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Is that how you see me? For starters, Rudolf just
went and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the three of us enjoy a lively chat
about the student council on our way back.
